heading: Authority to provide for review of regulated entities
label: 4519 Authority to provide for review of regulated entities
text: The Director may, on such terms and conditions as the Director deems appropriate, contract with any entity to conduct a review of the regulated entities.
notes: Amendments2010— struck out “that is a nationally recognized statistical rating organization, as such term is defined in ,” after “entity”.Pub. L. 111–203section 78c(a) of title 152008— substituted “regulated entities” for “enterprises by rating organization” in section catchline and “regulated entities” for “enterprises” in text.Pub. L. 110–2892006— substituted “that is a nationally recognized statistical rating organization, as such term is defined in ” for “effectively recognized by the Division of Market Regulation of the Securities and Exchange Commission as a nationally recognized statistical rating organization for the purposes of the capital rules for broker-dealers”.Pub. L. 109–291section 78c(a) of title 15
Effective Date of 2010 AmendmentAmendment by effective 2 years after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 111–203section 939(g) of Pub. L. 111–203section 24a of this titleJuly 21, 2010
